ValidationRule.description: Prevents stage change from Phone Interview to In Person Interview / In Person / References / Offer if any fields in the Telephone Debrief Section are blank.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISCHANGED(Stage__c ), CASE(PRIORVALUE(Stage__c ),"Phone Interview",1,0)=1, OR( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "In Person Interview"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "In Person"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "References"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "Offer")),
OR ( ISBLANK(Name_of_Facility__c), ISBLANK(Interviewing_Manager_Title__c), ISBLANK(Impression_of_Manager__c), ISBLANK (Experience_on_Call__c), ISBLANK (Comfortable_with_Expectations__c), ISBLANK(Interviewing_Anywhere_Else__c), ISBLANK (Factors_to_Accept__c), ISBLANK ( Rank_Other_Opportunities__c ), ISBLANK ( Any_issue_with_24hr_Decision__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must please complete the Telephone Debrief Section before moving to the new Stage
